title: Cassuvium cuneatum
taxonomy: Cassuvium cuneatum is a species of flowering plant in the family of Zygophyllaceae. This family is commonly known as the jujube or mesquite family. Zygophyllaceae belongs to the order of Zygophyllales, which is a part of the clade of core eudicots. The clade of core eudicots is a group of flowering plants that also includes the order of Celastrales and the order of Rosales. Cassuvium cuneatum is a part of the genus Cassuvium.
